emails.subject: EOL Hedge funds - any issues
emails.body: EOL Hedge funds any issues Hi guys, I hope you can help me. Are there any issues with us trading with Hedge funds on EnronOnline? Galtere have applied and seem to be one. I look forward to hearing from you. Regards Marie PCG London Forwarded by Marie Westin/LON/ECT on 20/11/2000 11:16 Justin Boyd 20/11/2000 11:10

emails.subject: EOL Hedge funds - any issues
emails.body: EOL Hedge funds any issues Hi guys, I hope you can help me. Are there any issues with us trading with Hedge funds on EnronOnline? Galtere have applied and seem to be one. I look forward to hearing from you. Regards Marie PCG London Forwarded by Marie Westin/LON/ECT on 20/11/2000 11:16 Justin Boyd 20/11/2000 11:10

emails.subject: Re: EOL Hedge funds - any issues
emails.body: Re: EOL Hedge funds any issues We have not admitted hedge funds to trade in the US because of the heightened regulatory scrutiny of trading with hedge funds generally since the Long-Term Capital Management debacle of last year. These same issues may not apply in the UK. Marie Westin 11/20/2000 05:23 AM
